message:
test(wave-61): trait coverage for migration, opportunity, lattice, builder

MigrationMode/MigrationFeature/MigrationConfig Debug/Clone/Copy/Hash/
Default/Eq, OpportunityScore/GateDecision/GateResult/ScoreError trait
impls, LatticeState/LeaseLatticeState Debug/Clone/Copy/Hash,
ObligationLattice Debug/Clone, BuildError Debug/Clone/PartialEq.
